failures.description: The agent misinterpreted the catalog search result and selected the last, most expensive listed kettle instead of the first and cheapest item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle from the ProductCatalogSearch results. The tool output at index 3 was relevant and clearly sorted by ascending price, with item 1240311797 priced at $137.17 as the cheapest. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer using item 2243454707 at $164.46, which contradicts the tool output. This error was not resolved later; the Evaluator incorrectly approved it.
